responsibilities: Create buy-in vision with key decision makers by building executive relationships around Microsoft solution value.
Engage and jointly sell with partners and priority ISVs to maximize business outcomes.
Build business cases and customer proposals to substantiate solution value
Lead multi-million-dollar deals requiring orchestration of virtual teams across industry
and exceed sales or cloud consumption quota.
Share customer feedback and best practices to influence Microsoft go-to-market and product strategies.
requirements: 7+ years of technology-related sales or account management experience.
7+ years leading sales of large cloud engagements
especially infrastructure migration and application modernization projects for large or global enterprise customers.
Deep business expertise and technical knowledge within enterprise sales.
Ability to lead virtual teams of sales
Ability to support customers through AI and digital transformation journeys.
Ability to remove roadblocks to deployment and drive customer satisfaction.
preferredQualifications: Understanding of Microsoft Azure Cloud platform or other public cloud platforms.
Understanding of IaaS and PaaS technologies and how they translate into business impact.
Experience with cloud migration and modernization.
Knowledge of enterprise software solutions and cloud/datacenter infrastructure competitor landscape.
Understanding of partner ecosystems and ability to leverage partner solutions to solve customer needs.
jd.employerSignal: Microsoft enterprise solution sales role focused on Azure consumption growth, executive relationship building, partner co-selling, cloud migration, modernization, AI, analytics, and large enterprise deal orchestration.
risks: Role is sales quota and cloud consumption driven.
Requires 7+ years technology sales or account management experience.
Requires experience leading large cloud engagements for large or global enterprise customers.
Work site requires 3 days per week in office.
jd.fitNotes: Strong fit requires enterprise technology sales, Azure or public cloud platform fluency, executive stakeholder management, partner co-selling, pipeline ownership, and large-deal orchestration. Technical cloud knowledge alone is not enough without quota-carrying sales evidence.

positioning.primaryHiringProblem: Microsoft needs an experienced quota-carrying enterprise cloud seller who can grow Azure consumption through executive selling and large deal closure.
positioning.managerHireReason: Hire someone who already owns enterprise sales cycles, forecasts, partners, and multi-million-dollar cloud engagements.
positioning.safestPositioning: Do not position as a qualified Azure Solution Specialist. If applying, present as a business-to-technology translator with Microsoft ecosystem adoption and solution enablement experience seeking a customer-facing cloud adoption or solution specialist bridge role.
positioning.headlineRecommendation: Business-to-Technology Translator | Microsoft 365 Copilot Adoption, Power Platform Automation & Enterprise AI Enablement
hiddenSkillsToSurface: Microsoft 365 Copilot adoption analytics and license-conversion support
Power Platform solution evaluation and governance
Business-case-adjacent value framing through usage, adoption, licensing, and operational visibility
Technical handoff, deployment support, troubleshooting, and validation checklists
evidenceToSuppress: evi-global-intune-rollout: Prompt Context Only and too weak for cloud-sales positioning.
evi-n8n-saas-workflow-automation-exposure: Interview Only and unsupported as professional production experience.
evi-existing-python-sql-pipeline-debugging: use only as technical-operations context, not cloud engineering depth.
evi-trender-buddy-gpt-eval-pipeline: avoid presenting as Azure infrastructure or enterprise cloud sales ownership.
claimsToAvoid: Azure architecture or production cloud infrastructure ownership

managerIntent.actualJobToBeDone: Acquire and close large enterprise Azure opportunities while coordinating Microsoft and partner resources to increase cloud consumption.
hiringManagerPainPoints: Deals stalled by technical, licensing, legal, or deployment blockers
Failure to convert technical interest into consumption and revenue
dealBreakers: Only technical or internal delivery experience

jdEvidenceMapping.requirement: 7+ years technology sales or account management experience
jdEvidenceMapping.safeCvAngle: Client-facing technical project coordination and vendor alignment
jdEvidenceMapping.gapOrRisk: Evidence shows project execution and a sales specialist title but not 7+ years of quota-carrying sales or account management.

jdEvidenceMapping.requirement: Leading large cloud engagements for enterprise customers
jdEvidenceMapping.marketExpectation: Ownership of major cloud migration or modernization programs
jdEvidenceMapping.safeCvAngle: Technical implementation coordination and deployment participation
jdEvidenceMapping.gapOrRisk: No evidence of leading Azure, infrastructure migration, application modernization, or large global cloud engagements.

jdEvidenceMapping.requirement: Executive relationship building and customer buy-in
jdEvidenceMapping.marketExpectation: C-level selling and executive sponsorship creation
jdEvidenceMapping.safeCvAngle: Produced adoption and licensing evidence for managers, leaders, Finance, Microsoft, and regional stakeholders
jdEvidenceMapping.gapOrRisk: Stakeholder coordination is supported, but executive relationship ownership and commercial buy-in are not.

jdEvidenceMapping.marketExpectation: Joint account planning and partner-led opportunity execution
jdEvidenceMapping.safeCvAngle: Vendor coordination and Microsoft-related program collaboration
jdEvidenceMapping.gapOrRisk: Vendor coordination is not equivalent to partner co-selling or ISV opportunity ownership.

jdEvidenceMapping.requirement: Business cases, proposals, negotiation, and deal closure
jdEvidenceMapping.safeCvAngle: Supported client requirements, bidding, negotiation coordination, and delivery documentation
jdEvidenceMapping.gapOrRisk: Source supports coordination around bidding and negotiation but not proposal ownership, revenue, contract closure, or competitive displacement.

jdEvidenceMapping.requirement: Pipeline management, forecasting, and quota attainment
jdEvidenceMapping.marketExpectation: CRM hygiene, forecast accuracy, and measurable sales performance
jdEvidenceMapping.gapOrRisk: No evidence of sales pipeline, forecast, quota, or cloud-consumption ownership.

jdEvidenceMapping.requirement: AI and digital transformation customer advisory
jdEvidenceMapping.marketExpectation: Ability to connect AI and cloud solutions to customer business outcomes
jdEvidenceMapping.safeCvAngle: Enterprise AI adoption, governance, automation, analytics, and license-value enablement
jdEvidenceMapping.gapOrRisk: Strong solution translation evidence, but primarily internal rather than external customer advisory.

jdEvidenceMapping.requirement: Remove deployment roadblocks and drive customer satisfaction
jdEvidenceMapping.marketExpectation: Post-sale escalation leadership and customer-success ownership
jdEvidenceMapping.safeCvAngle: Production troubleshooting, operational handoff, issue resolution, and vendor coordination
jdEvidenceMapping.gapOrRisk: Operational support is supported; customer satisfaction ownership and cloud deployment escalation are not.

jdEvidenceMapping.requirement: Azure, IaaS, PaaS, migration, and modernization knowledge
jdEvidenceMapping.marketExpectation: Technical fluency sufficient for cloud solution selling
jdEvidenceMapping.safeCvAngle: Azure Data Explorer, Microsoft ecosystem, API integration, and deployment-support exposure
jdEvidenceMapping.gapOrRisk: Evidence does not establish Azure platform, IaaS/PaaS, cloud economics, migration, or modernization depth.

internalTerminology.originalTerm: M365 Copilot Trial GO Plus Program
internalTerminology.externalFriendlyWording: Enterprise Microsoft 365 Copilot adoption and license-conversion program
internalTerminology.reason: The internal program label is less useful than the business outcome and Microsoft product context.
Internal product name lacks external context.

internalTerminology.originalTerm: TOMO Consumer Chatbot Evaluation & A/B Testing
internalTerminology.externalFriendlyWording: Customer-service chatbot platform evaluation and A/B testing
internalTerminology.reason: Internal platform name should be translated into evaluation work and decision value.

internalTerminology.originalTerm: Legal DPIA App / AI Impact Assessment
internalTerminology.externalFriendlyWording: Automated privacy and AI-impact assessment workflow
internalTerminology.reason: Describe the business process rather than the internal application label.
HERO is an internal legacy-system name and may not be recognizable externally.

internalTerminology.externalFriendlyWording: Internal API engagement and integration governance model
internalTerminology.reason: Internal platform name is not a recognized public product in this context.
Personal name and internal handover label are not externally meaningful.

remainingGaps.gap: Quota-carrying enterprise technology sales and Azure consumption ownership
remainingGaps.mitigation: Do not claim it; pursue cloud adoption, technical account, solution enablement, or partner technical specialist roles where delivery evidence is relevant.

remainingGaps.gap: Large Azure cloud migration and application modernization engagements
remainingGaps.mitigation: Add only verified migration or modernization project evidence; otherwise position related Workday, Intune, API, and enterprise automation work as implementation support.

remainingGaps.gap: Executive selling, negotiation, proposal ownership, and deal closure
remainingGaps.mitigation: Use client-facing technical coordination evidence conservatively and prepare concrete examples of stakeholder influence, requirements discovery, and vendor negotiation.

remainingGaps.mitigation: Do not include sales metrics without source evidence; treat this JD as a stretch or avoid application.

top3SellingPoints.title: Remove deployment roadblocks and drive customer satisfaction
top3SellingPoints.managerValue: Production troubleshooting, operational handoff, issue resolution, and vendor coordination

skillsToForeground: Build Power BI adoption dashboards for enterprise AI tools using audit logs, license data, user lists, and usage exports.
Design AI adoption KPI views that make enterprise productivity targets measurable by team, manager, and usage trend.
Document Power Platform governance practices covering environment ownership, connection references, licensing, and production transferability.
Take over and operate production Power Automate flows across HR automation, scheduled syncs, monitoring, and troubleshooting.
Microsoft 365 Copilot adoption analytics and license-conversion support
Power Platform solution evaluation and governance
Business-case-adjacent value framing through usage, adoption, licensing, and operational visibility
Technical handoff, deployment support, troubleshooting, and validation checklists
Automate recruiting dispatch by synchronizing Workday candidate and requisition data into SharePoint-backed Power Apps workflows.
Define provider-consumer engagement standards for internal API platforms and cross-team integration work.
Maintain production automation credentials and environment variables with documented renewal and publish procedures.

requiredCriteria.label: Role identity
requiredCriteria.description: States a credible role identity for this JD without pretending unsupported direct-fit experience.

requiredCriteria.label: Relevant capability
requiredCriteria.description: Surfaces the strongest supported capabilities that overlap with the JD.

requiredCriteria.label: Business value
requiredCriteria.description: Explains the business or stakeholder value of the candidate's supported work.

requiredCriteria.label: Evidence grounding
requiredCriteria.description: Avoids unsupported ownership, metrics, seniority, sales, architecture, or cloud-delivery claims.

requiredCriteria.label: Customer context
requiredCriteria.description: Connects the Summary to customer, stakeholder, adoption, enablement, or operating context when supported.

requiredCriteria.label: Career positioning
requiredCriteria.description: Separates supported transferable fit from unsupported core requirements.

requiredCriteria.label: Clarity
requiredCriteria.description: Uses concise external recruiter language without generic filler or tool stuffing.

careerProfile.identity: Li Ting Kao / Christine Kao; Business Process Engineer / IS BA with enterprise AI, chatbot operations, Power Platform automation, Power BI analytics, Workday/HRIS, HR technology, AI governance, compliance workflow, API integration, and cross-region stakeholder delivery experience.
targetRoles: AI Product Operations / AI Program Specialist
Data / BI Analyst for HR technology
careerProfile.positioning: Business-to-technology translator who turns operational problems into enterprise automation, BI dashboards, AI assistant workflows, governance controls, API integrations, and maintainable internal systems. Strongest grounded positioning is Trend Micro enterprise internal technology delivery across Global HR, Customer Support, IS/IT, Legal/Privacy, AI governance, recruiting, payroll, onboarding, and regional operations.

education.school: Google / Google Next recap learning series
education.notes: Covered Agentic Enterprise at scale, AI-era data platform, NoSQL plus Anthropic Claude, and Palo Alto case. Treat as learning activity, not formal degree.

education.notes: Completed or participated in GCP and GenAI training activities as Non-RD participant; no formal certificate provided in source.

careerProfile.claimBoundaries: Use parsed snapshots as source of truth. Do not invent exact revenue, savings, team size, active user count, formal certifications, formal language level, or external product ownership beyond the source. Prefer built, supported, coordinated, participated, evaluated, maintained, took over, served as BA/interface, or led design sessions according to source-specific wording. Treat internal IDs, endpoint URLs, PO amounts, app/report/environment IDs, named internal stakeholders, workspace IDs, account names, and vendor contacts as internal proof, not external CV wording. Do not claim formal Japanese proficiency from bilingual chatbot content. Do not claim quantified business impact beyond metrics explicitly stated. Preserve title and period conflicts until verified.

selectedSkills.cvWording: Build Power BI adoption dashboards for enterprise AI tools using audit logs, license data, user lists, and usage exports.
selectedSkills.evidenceSummary: Built the company's first systematic M365 Copilot adoption dashboard in Power BI, integrating CopilotAuditLog, CopilotExportUsers, DL lists, SharePoint, M365 Admin export, and related usage data to track 24 Copilot applications with daily 8 AM refresh.

selectedSkills.evidenceSummary: Designed IS department AI productivity KPI views, including active usage tracking against an 80% target and manager/leader reporting views.

selectedSkills.cvWording: Document Power Platform governance practices covering environment ownership, connection references, licensing, and production transferability.
selectedSkills.evidenceSummary: Created Power Automate and Power Apps business scenario evaluation documentation and established guidance around SharePoint site environments, Connection References, ownership transfer, premium connectors, and license needs.

selectedSkills.cvWording: Take over and operate production Power Automate flows across HR automation, scheduled syncs, monitoring, and troubleshooting.
selectedSkills.evidenceSummary: Took over production HR automation flows after TOI completion on 2026-06-18, covering AI Screening, COE PDF generation, Japan synchronization, Taiwan attendance import, monitoring, troubleshooting, and credential update responsibilities.

selectedSkills.cvWording: Automate recruiting dispatch by synchronizing Workday candidate and requisition data into SharePoint-backed Power Apps workflows.

selectedSkills.cvWording: Maintain production automation credentials and environment variables with documented renewal and publish procedures.

selectedSkills.cvWording: Coordinate enterprise AI enablement programs across training logistics, milestone visibility, participant tracking, and vendor instructor coordination.

selectedSkills.cvWording: Translate HR operations requirements into Workday configuration, data migration, reporting, and operating specifications.

selectedStories.title: Replaced subjective chatbot platform comparison with data-driven evaluation
